description: The Best Western Hotel & SPA Cœur de Cassis welcomes you in the heart of downtown Cassis, in the center of the village, just 200 meters from the port and 300 meters from the beach. It is the ideal starting point for discovering the magnificent Calanques National Park. After a day of exploration, treat yourself to a moment of relaxation in our SPA (access by reservation, not permitted for children under 14), equipped with a jacuzzi, hammam, sauna and sensory shower. Massages are also available by reservation. The establishment, equipped with an elevator, is fully accessible to guests with reduced mobility. All rooms feature air conditioning, free Wi-Fi access, a television and a minibar. You can enjoy a private bathroom equipped with toiletries and a hairdryer. Comfort, Superior rooms as well as Suites also feature a Nespresso coffee machine. A continental buffet breakfast is served every morning in the dining room or on the sunny terrace. The reception, open 24 hours a day, warmly welcomes you and remains at your disposal to advise you and make your stay as pleasant as possible.

 Circuit Paul Ricard is 40 minutes' drive away.

description:
Set in the historical heart of Aigues-Mortes, 200 yards from the Tour de Constance, Hotel Saint Louis - Au Coeur des Remparts is an air-conditioned hotel with a wellness center and restaurant. Free WiFi access is available on site and public city parking spots are available for free.

All rooms feature a contemporary décor inspired by the region and are fitted a flat-screen TV, a mini-bar and a telephone. Each room has a private bathroom. In the summer, guests can enjoy a drink on the patio or sun terrace. The onsite restaurant features a baroque-style décor and offers modern Camargue cuisine made with local produce and outdoor seating.

Nîmes is 43 km from Hotel Saint Louis - Au Coeur des Remparts, while Arles is 49 km from the property. Montpellier - Mediterranee Airport is 26 km away.

 There is a wellness center with a sauna and massages are also available on request.

Hotel Le Médiéval provides a daily buffet continental-style breakfast that can be taken on the terrace in fine weather. The hotel also provides free Wi-Fi access in public areas.

description: Set in a building dating from the 15th century, La Villa Mazarin is located in the fortified city of Aigues-Mortes. It offers a terrace and guests can enjoy a drink at the bar. Free WiFi is available throughout. The guest rooms have air conditioning, heating, satellite TV, a telephone and a fridge. All rooms are furnished in 17th-century Provençale style. In the hotel's restaurant, La Table, you can enjoy French culinary specialties or choose from a selection of light meals and snacks. The salon opens onto the courtyard and sun terrace. The restaurant is open in the evenings from Wednesday to Sunday from 7pm to 9pm, and only at weekends for lunch (noon to 1pm). Closed on Mondays and Tuesdays. The Villa Mazarin has a private underground car park 1.85 m high. This option, which costs €18 per day per vehicle, must be booked in advance (subject to availability, as the number of spaces is limited). Your pet (dog or cat) is welcome (ON RESERVATION - one pet per room - supplement of €25 per day applies). Please contact us beforehand. Our relaxation area is available until midnight (sauna, jacuzzi, fitness room, swimming pool heated between 23° and 25°). Montpellier is 35 km from La Villa Mazarin, while Nîmes is 43 km away. The nearest airport is Mediterranee Airport, 25 km from the property.

hotel_name: Hôtel les jardins du canal - piscine chauffée - solaire eco responsable - parking - garage - bornes électriques - accueil vélos - kids friendly

Hôtel les jardins du canal  is a 5-minute walk to the fortified city, on the banks of the canal, visible from its panoramic terrace and swimming pool. It offers air-conditioned rooms with free WiFi. Free parking is available and garage parking is possible for an extra charge, or free of charge for motorbikes.

All of the rooms in the 3-star Hotel Canal Aigues Mortes are soundproofed and have a flat-screen TV with French and foreign channels.

In the warmer months the buffet breakfast can be eaten on the outdoor terrace. In the summer, guests can also enjoy snacks or light meals by the canal.

Bicycle rental is available onsite and there is also a seminar room for meetings.

Hotel Canal Aigues Mortes is a 10-minute drive from Grau-du-Roi beach and a 20-minute drive from Montpellier-Méditerranée Airport. Aigues-Mortes train station is a 4-minute walk away. Montpellier, Arles and Nîmes can all be reached within 45 minutes by car.

Located outside Aigues-Mortes’ fortifications, Résidence Odalys Le Mas des Flamants is just next to the Vidourle River. You can relax in the swimming and paddling pools or go to the beach at Le-Grau-du-Roi, 7 km away.

Meals can be prepared in the accommodation’s kitchenette and enjoyed in the small dining area. Each kitchenette includes hotplates, a microwave and a dishwasher.

One free parking space is offered per apartment and an on-site launderette is also at your disposal. Local activities include walking the 5 minutes to the town centre or relaxing on Port-Camargue Beach, 7 km away.

description:

The soundproofed rooms at Maisons du Monde Hôtel & Suites - Marseille Vieux Port include a flat-screen TV with satellite channels. Some rooms also have port and sea views.

Maisons du Monde Hôtel & Suites - Marseille Vieux Port is just a few steps from the Vieux-Port Hotel de Ville Metro Station. Boulevard La Canebière is 400 metres away, where public transport is available to all of Marseille's famous sites.

hotel_name: Staycity Aparthotels Marseille Centre Vieux Port

Featuring free WiFi, Staycity Aparthotels Marseille Centre Vieux Port offers air-conditioned accommodation in Marseille, only 550 metres from the port. Marseille Saint-Charles train station is a 12-minute walk away from the property.

All apartments and studios are accessible via a lift and feature a flat-screen TV. Each unit has a kitchenette fitted with a dishwasher, microwave, toaster, fridge, stovetop, coffee machine and kettle. There is a private bathroom with free toiletries in each unit. Towels and bed linen are offered.

Bars, shops and restaurants can be found within a 2-minute walk of the property.

The nearest metro station is only 44 metres from the property. Velodrome Stadium is 6.4 km from Staycity Aparthotels Marseille, while La Canebiere is 1 km away. The nearest airport is Marseille Provence Airport, 24 km from the property.

Some units come with a balcony.

With free WiFi, this 3-star property offers a concierge service and luggage storage space. The non-smoking property is located 200 metres from Marseille Saint-Charles Train Station.

Guests at the property can enjoy a buffet or a continental breakfast.

Languages spoken at the 24-hour front desk include Arabic, English, Spanish and French.

Popular points of interest near Hôtel Marseille Centre Gare Saint-Charles include Joliette Metro Station, Les Terrasses du Port Shopping Centre and Vieux Port Metro station. 

Marseille Provence Airport is 22 km from the property.

Located in Marseille, just 400 metres from Palais du Pharo, Novotel Marseille Vieux Port is a 5-minute walk from Catalans Beach. Offering free WiFi, it has a restaurant with panoramic views from the terrace of the Old Port. All rooms at this Novotel are air-conditioned with an en suite bathroom and satellite TV. Each room includes free WiFi access and a separate toilet.

The restaurant at Novotel Marseille Vieux Port, the Lacydon, is a creative table. Come and discover the Cocktails menu created by our barman at the pool bar, open until late in the evening.

The Museum of European and Mediterranean Civilisations (MuCEM) and Fort Saint-Jean are within a 2.8 km walk of the hotel. Novotel Marseille is easily accessible from the A7 and A55 motorways via the Vieux Port Tunnel, and from the A50 motorway via the Tunnel Prado Carenage. It is 4.5 km from the Velodrome Stadium. Private on-site parking is available at a supplement.

Just 200 from the Hôpital de la Timone in Marseille, ibis Marseille Timone offers modern accommodation with free Wi-Fi, a bar serving snacks 24 hour a day, a terrace and meeting rooms.

The hotel’s rooms all feature a desk and a flat-screen TV. Their private bathroom is fitted with a shower and hairdryer.

A buffet breakfast composed of sweet and savoury dishes such as eggs, fruit salad, yogurts and juices is served every day. Pastries baked on site and fresh French Madeleine cakes are also on offer, as well as a hot beverage and a piece of fruit to take away. Outside of regular breakfast hours guests can also enjoy a lighter option, available from 04:00. They can also dine out at the hotel’s restaurant.

La Timone Metro Station offers connection to Line 1, just 230 metres away. Le Dôme Amphiteatre is 4.2 km away, while the Vélodrome Stadium and Marseille Saint-Charles Train Station are a 15-minute travel away by metro.

The Hotel Villa M Marseille welcomes you in a newly renovated establishment.

With breathtaking views of the Mediterranean Sea and the Prado beaches, it enjoys a prime location just 4.5 km from the Velodrome Stadium and 4 km from the Old Port and Cannebière. The Calanques de Sormiou or d'En Vau are just 7 km from the property.

All our air-conditioned rooms are tastefully decorated. Some rooms have a coffee machine or terrace, while others have stunning sea views.

Our restaurant welcomes you from Monday to Friday for lunch . The chef offers tasty seasonal cuisine that will delight young and adult alike. Musical entertainment is sometimes offered around buffets, ask at the reception

Our bartender will offer you seasonal cocktails, of which he alones knows the secret. Room service is available every day from 12 noon to 9:30 pm.

Enjoy your buffet breakfast at the restaurant, on the terrace or in the comfort of your room.

Families and children are welcome at Villa M Marseille.

Our team will be happy to advice you throughout your stay, guide you through the city and help you to discover our region.

Villa M Marseille is a 20-minute drive from Saint-Charles Train Station and a 35-minute drive from the airport.
Maison Olea in Marseille offers a recently renovated bed and breakfast with a sun terrace and free WiFi. Each room includes a private bathroom with a walk-in shower, work desk, and garden views.

hotel_name: The Babel Community Hôtel - Vieux Port
description: The Babel Community Hôtel - Vieux Port in Marseille offers a central position with a view. Plage des Catalans is 2 km away, while Vieux Port Metro station is a 5-minute walk. Saint-Ferreol Street lies 300 metres nearby.

hotel_name: Radisson Blu Hotel Marseille Vieux Port
description:
Located in Marseille overlooking the Vieux Port, Radisson Blu Hotel Marseille Vieux Port is a 4-star hotel. It offers an outdoor swimming pool overlooking Fort Saint-Nicholas and a fitness room with a panoramic view of the main monuments of the city. Free WiFi access is available.

The air-conditioned guest rooms feature either a Provencal or an African décor. Some rooms have a view of the port and a Nespresso coffee machine. Each room is equipped with a flat-screen TV with cable channels. Bathrobes and slippers are provided in the suites.

The Quai du 7eme restaurant serves Mediterranean cuisine and proposes buffet breakfast every morning and guests can also enjoy cocktails and tapas in the Bar, with a view over the port.

A boules pitch can be enjoyed on the interior courtyard. With a 24-hour reception, Radisson Blu Hotel Marseille Vieux Port is also partnered with the 5 Mondes Spa just 40 metres away, where beauty treatments are possible at a discounted rate.

Indigo La Criée Car Park is just 80 metres away, available for an additional charge.

Pets welcome - Dog's up to 8kg, Supplement charged at €30.00 per day payable direct to hotel.

Located in Marseille, just 500 metres from Les Terrasses du Port shoppingter, the Golden Tulip Marseille Euromed offers sea views, as well as free access to a gym, heated  indoor pool (pool: 12M × 5M, 1M deep) and sun terrace. Enjoy a drink at the bar and a meal at La Table restaurant. Free Wi-Fi access is also available.

Kindly note that There is no private parking at the hotel. We invite you to come to the front desk, can a QR code and benefit from a discount with our partner.

Rooms feature air conditioning and flat-screen TVs. The private bathroom features a bath or shower, free toiletries and a hairdryer. Suites feature a sitting area, ideal for relaxing after a busy day. Access to the upper floors and rooms is only possible with a magnetic card, guaranteeing the necessary security.

The hotel has a 24-hour reception. The hotel also features a food truck and tandem-style bicycles.

The Velodrome stadium is 5 km from the Golden Tulip Marseille Euromed.
The ferry terminal is 1 km away.
The Mucem and Grotte Cosquer are 1.5 km away. The nearest airport, Marseille-Provence, is 25 km away. Public parking is available nearby. A parking pass can be purchased at reception.
The Old Port and the Panier district are approximately 1.5 km away.

The on-site restaurant serves a buffet breakfast and traditional French cuisine for lunch and dinner. Guests can relax in the evenings in the property’s spacious bar.

The property offers a 24-hour front desk and meeting facilities.

The ibis Styles Marseille Velodrome Convention Center is 3 km from Marsaille's Vieux Port and 2 km from the nearest beach. The hotel has a car park.

description:
La Résidence Du Vieux Port is set right on the banks of the Old Port in central Marseille. It offers modern rooms and suites with panoramic views of the city. Free WiFi access is available.

The stylish air-conditioned and soundproofed rooms include a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a private bathroom. There is a kettle in all rooms with tea and coffee provided. Some have wide bay windows and a terrace offering views of the Old Port.

Le Relais 50, the adjoining restaurant, serves Mediterranean specialities and guests can enjoy a drink in the hotel’s bar.

La Résidence Du Vieux Port is just 200 metres from La Canebière and the Vieux Port Metro Station, which can take guests to Saint-Charles Train Station. Public parking is available on site at an additional fee.
Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, work desks, free toiletries, showers, TVs, and soundproofing. Guests appreciate the room cleanliness and excellent service.

Hôtel Hermès is just 35 metres from the Vieux Port in central Marseilles. It offers a roof-top terrace with panoramic views of the harbour and the city, and free Wi-Fi.

Each guest room at the Hermès has a partial view of the Vieux Port. They are soundproofed and feature flat-screen TVs with satellite channels and private bathrooms.

The hotel staff are available to assist you 24 hours a day. Guests can enjoy a buffet breakfast every morning, served in the dining room.

The Vieux-Port Hotel de Ville Metro Station is just a 3-minute walk from the Hermès hotel. The Saint Charles SNCF Train Station is a 20-minute walk away.

hotel_name: Grand Hotel Beauvau Marseille Vieux-Port - MGallery Collection
description:
Grand Hôtel Beauvau Marseille Vieux Port - MGallery is an elegant 4-star hotel in the centre of Marseille. Grand Hotel Beauvau’s bar, Le Beauvau, invites guests to enjoy a drink while looking out over Vieux Port and the Mediterranean Sea. Free WiFi access is available.

Decorated with Empire or Napoleon III furniture, rooms and suites at Grand Hôtel Beauvau Marseille Vieux Port - MGallery are air-conditioned and offer satellite and cable TV. The private bathrooms feature a bath and shower, large mirror, hairdryer, bathrobes, slippers and toiletries.

A Provencal-style Breakfast featuring local produce is served daily in the comfort of your room or in the breakfast room, which offers views of the port. A variety of hot meals and cold snacks are also available with 24-hour room service.

The front desk is open 24 hours a day and guests will be welcomed in French, Italian, Spanish or English.

Hotel Relax is set in Marseille, a 2-minute walk from the Old Port.

Each room is fitted with a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower. Extras include free toiletries and a hairdryer. Hotel Relax features free WiFi throughout the property.

There is a 24-hour front desk at the property.

Velodrome Stadium is 4 km from Hotel Relax, while La Canebiere is 700 metres away. Marseille Provence Airport is 27 km from the property.

Ideally located in the centre of Marseille, Hôtel Maison Montgrand - Vieux Port offers air-conditioned rooms, a garden, free WiFi and a terrace. The property has a bar, as well as a restaurant serving French cuisine. The accommodation provides room service, and luggage storage for guests.

All guest rooms in the hotel are equipped with a flat-screen TV. With a private bathroom fitted with a shower and free toiletries, some units at Hôtel Maison Montgrand - Vieux Port also have a city view. At the accommodation all rooms include bed linen and towels.

A continental, American or gluten-free breakfast can be enjoyed at the property.

Non-stop assistance is available at the reception, where staff speak Arabic, English, Spanish and French.

Popular points of interest near Hôtel Maison Montgrand - Vieux Port include Saint-Ferreol Street, Vieux Port Metro station and Castellane Metro Station. The nearest airport is Marseille Provence Airport, 23 km from the hotel.

Novotel Marseille Centre Prado is located in one of Marseilles’ business districts. It is 50 metres from the Périer Metro Station providing access to all areas of the city, and 1.5 km from the Orange Velodrome Stadium.

Air-conditioned guest rooms feature a flat-screen TV with satellite channels and a mini-fridge. There are also facilities for making tea and coffee, and the bathrooms include a hairdryer and free toiletries. Free Wi-Fi access is provided.

The restaurant Novotel Café offers a menu of seasonal produce and daily specials featuring original and modern cuisine with a selection of salads, sandwiches, meals and desserts. Guests can have a professional meeting, or enjoy a glass of wine in the open space.

Centre de Congrès is 1 km away and the hotel is 2 km from the Old Port and La Canebière Boulevard; all of which are accessible by transit.

Marseille Saint-Charles Train Station is a 10-minute drive away and Marseille Airport is a 30-minute drive away. Marseille Chanot Exposition Centre is 1.2 km away. Paid public parking is available nearby with charging stations for electric cars available.

hotel_name: The Good Mother - Vue sur Notre Dame de la Garde
description: The Good Mother - Vue sur Notre Dame de la Garde in Marseille offers a spacious apartment with two bedrooms and two bathrooms. The living room includes a sofa and dining table, providing ample space for relaxation and meals.

Hostel Vertigo Vieux Port is located 5 minutes from the old port. Its central location means you can enjoy all that this beautiful city has to offer.
The first beach is a 15-minute walk away, France's oldest district, the Panier, is 20 minutes away, as is the iconic Bonne Mère, Notre Dame de la Garde cathedral, but be prepared to climb. It's worth it: the views and sunsets are magical! It's a perfect place to have a drink.
Auberge Vertigo is also close to metro, buses and tramway lines, so you can hike in the incredible Parc National des Calanques, stroll the streets, enjoy the beaches and the Mediterranean, and visit the surrounding area and Provence !

You'll find dormitories from 2 to 16 beds, spread out in several buildings around a large flourishing courtyard, where you can soak up the sun, have lunch and meet other guests for a drink. You can use the aromatic garden to flavour your dishes.

Two kitchens are available around the clock, as well as chill-out areas.
A laundry service is available.
Sanitary facilities are in the dormitories (several toilets and showers in the 6-, 8- and 16-bed dormitories).
You can arrive at any time; our team is on hand at reception to welcome you 24 hours a day. Chen-in from 3pm, and checked out at 10am, but feel free to come before or stay after, leaving your luggage in the free luggage room, taking advantage of the communal areas and the kitchen...

The Auberge offers an all-you-can-eat breakfast, served from 8am to 10am, for 6 euros.

The rooms and communal areas are equipped with air conditioning and heating, as well as Wi-Fi.

You can also enjoy the Vertigo bar-restaurant, on the corner of the street, from Tuesday to Saturday, from 6pm to 2am: tapas, bistro, cocktails...
Check out all our easter eggs and win a drink at the bar!


How to get there:

- From Gare Saint-Charles: Line 1, direction La Fourragère, Vieux Port or Estrangin station (15 minutes)
- Parking: Cours d'Estienne d'Orves car park (3 minutes)
https://www.indigoneo.fr/fr/parkings/17103/parking-estienne-dorves

- Le Vélo terminal (city bicycles) on the corner of the street


When you arrive, don't hesitate to ask the team for advice, they'll be delighted to help you discover our beautiful city, and scan the QR codes under your bed to find out about our favourite addresses!
address: 38 Rue Fort Notre Dame, 13007 Marseille, France

description: Appartement Lumineux in Marseille offers a one-bedroom apartment with a living room and a bathroom. The kitchen includes a coffee machine, kitchenware, and a sofa bed. Guests can enjoy an inner courtyard view and a quiet street setting.
address: 4e Etage 6 Rue de Village, 13006 Marseille, France

description: MEININGER Marseille Centre la Joliette in Marseille offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and city views. Each room includes a seating area, free toiletries, and soundproofing.
Cosy Studio City Center Marseille offers a cosy apartment in Marseille. The property features one bedroom and one bathroom, providing a comfortable stay for guests.

Situated in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer in the Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur Region, 100 metres from Eglise des Stes Maries and a 2-minute walk away from the beach and the port, Hotel Le Méditérranée features a sun terrace and views of the garden. Guests can enjoy the on-site bar. Free WiFi is offered.

The rooms have a flat-screen TV. Breakfast is served every morning on the terrace.

You will find luggage storage space at the property.

Nimes-Ales-Camargue-Cevennes Airport is 34 km from the property.

hotel_name: Appartement front de mer avec vue et accès plage, Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer
description: Appartement front de mer avec vue et accès plage in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer offers direct beachfront access and stunning sea views. Amphora Beach is just a few steps away, providing easy beachfront relaxation.
address: 2 Avenue Commandant Jacques Y Cousteau, 13460 Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, France

hotel_name: Jolie maisonnette à proximité de toutes commodités
description: Jolie maisonnette à proximité de toutes commodités in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer offers direct beachfront access and a terrace with stunning sea views. Guests can relax on the balcony or enjoy the outdoor dining area.
Résidence L'Oiseau des Mers in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer offers a 4-star apartment with a terrace and free WiFi. Guests enjoy air-conditioning, a private bathroom, and a fully equipped kitchen.

Set by a pond, Les Rizières is a hotel situated 2.8 km from Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer and 2.4 km from Pont De Gau Ornithological Park with its pink flamingos. All the rooms are situated at ground-level around a patio planted with trees.

Air-conditioning, satellite TV and a minibar feature in the rooms. Free WiFi internet access is available throughout the hotel.

Less than 10 km from Les Rizières is the Camargue National Park and the sea is just 2.8 km away.

Please note that a maximum of  1 pet is allowed per room.  Please note that the property can only allow pets with a maximum weight of 15 kilos. An extra charge may apply.

hotel_name: Mas du Clos de la Barque
description: Mas du Clos de la Barque in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer offers a ground-floor apartment with a private entrance. The property features a garden and terrace, complemented by free WiFi.
address: Mas du Clos de la Barque bac du sauvage, 13460 Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, France

description: Les Deux Pins in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer offers a sun terrace, garden, open-air bath, seasonal outdoor swimming pool, and free WiFi. Guests can also enjoy a public bath, outdoor play area, outdoor seating, bicycle parking, and barbecue facilities.

Domaine du Soleil Couchant offers a serene holiday home experience in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer. Guests enjoy a sun terrace, lush garden, and a seasonal outdoor swimming pool. Free WiFi is available throughout the property.
address: 920 Chemin Bas des Launes, 13460 Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, France

description: Appartement "La Rose des Vents" in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer offers direct beachfront access and a sun terrace. Guests can relax by the sea and enjoy free WiFi throughout the apartment.
address: N°40, bâtimentB rue carriero di courrejou, 13460 Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, France

address: RD 38, route d aigues mortes, 13460 Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, France

hotel_name: Appartement calme à deux pas de la mer
description: Appartement calme à deux pas de la mer in Saintes-M-de-la-Mer offers a ground-floor apartment with one bedroom and a living room. The property features a terrace, kitchenette, and a private entrance.
address: rez de chaussée 10 carriero dou pounentau, 13460 Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, France

description: Les Ondines in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer offers a holiday home with two bedrooms, a bathroom, and a spacious living room. Guests can enjoy a terrace and a garden, perfect for relaxation.

This hotel is located in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, just 60 metres from the Mediterranean Sea and 30 metres from the Laune Lake. It features a cocktail bar with a flower-filled terrace.

The guest rooms at Le Castelet are equipped with free Wi-Fi access and TVs. Each has a private bathroom with showers and most have private toilets. The hotel serves a continental breakfast every morning in the dining room.

Le Castelet is just a 15-minute drive from the Camargue National Park and Arles is a 35-minute drive away. Montpellier is approximately 50 km from the hotel.

Appartement Camargue in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer offers a one-bedroom apartment with a terrace and balcony. The living room includes a sofa bed and a dining table, while the kitchen is equipped with modern appliances.
address: Les impériaux III, appartement n°15 1 Place des Impériaux, 13460 Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, France

description:
Located 50 metres from the beach, Le Dauphin Bleu faces the Mediterranean Sea and is 400 metres from the centre of Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer's historic old town. The hotel offers free WiFi in the guest rooms.

All rooms are air-conditioned and have a flat-screen TV, a private bathroom and some have sea views.

Situated in the Rhône delta, this hotel is just 700 metres from a fortified church dating from the Middle Ages. The local area also offers water sports such as windsurfing. Le Dauphin Bleu is 56.1km from Montpelier Airport.

Set in the Camargue Regional Park, Abrivado is an air-conditioned hotel located beside the harbour in the town of Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer. It is 50 metres from the beach and the surrounding shops. Free WiFi access is provided in the guest rooms.

A TV is included in the rooms, which feature a simple décor. 12 of the rooms offer a sea view and 6 of them also feature a private furnished terrace. The private bathrooms include a hairdryer.

A continental breakfast is offered every morning at the hotel Abrivado for an extra charge.

Low-cost public parking is available nearby, and you can visit Arles, located 40 km away. Montpellier Airport is 52 km from the hotel. Public parking is available nearby.

Hotel La Tramontane welcomes you in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, in the heart of the Camargues area. It offers individually-decorated rooms leading to the outdoor swimming pool, the garden and the private pond.

Soundproofed and air-conditioned, the guest rooms all feature a television and Wi-Fi access. They are decorated in a typical Provencal style and feature a private terrace overlooking the garden and the swimming pool.

We will have the pleasure to serve you on your terrace, at sunset, an aperitif accompanied by tapas to satisfy your gluttony or your appetite.

Free private secured parking is available on site.
address: 94 Chemin Bas de Dromar, 13460 Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, France

description:
Located in the Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur region, Le Fangassier a hotel set in a Camargue-style building 600 metres from the beach in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer. It offers free WiFi access.

All the air-conditioned rooms at Le Fangassier feature a telephone and a flat-screen TV. A bathroom with a bath or shower is also provided. Some rooms have a private terrace or balcony.

A buffet breakfast is served every morning at Le Fangassier.

Shops and restaurants can be found within a 5-minute walk.

This hotel is a 15-minute drive from Château d’Avignon and Arles is 37 km away.

Thalacap Camargue faces the beach in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, 5 minutes' walk from the city centre. You will enjoy a seasonal outdoor seawater swimming pool as well as an indoor swimming pool, sauna and hammam all year round at no additional cost

All of the rooms at Thalacap Camargue have a flat-screen TV and free WiFi access and air conditioning.

The restaurant serves Mediterranean-style meals. Weather permitting, meals can be enjoyed on the terrace with a panoramic view of the sea.

In addition to the other relaxation facilities, guests have direct access to a Thalassotherapy centre, which provides a number of health and beauty treatments for an additional charge.

Arles is 37 km away. private parking is available on site for 10€/night.
address: Avenue du Dr Cambon, 13460 Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, France

description: Hôtel Casa Marina in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer offers direct beachfront access, a sun terrace, and a lush garden. Guests enjoy sea views and a relaxing outdoor seating area.

hotel_name: Oh! Campings - La Brise de Camargue
description: Oh! Campings - La Brise de Camargue in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer offers direct beachfront access with Amphora Beach an 8-minute walk away. Guests enjoy stunning sea views and easy beachfront activities.
address: BP 74 Rue Marcel Carrière, 13460 Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, France

description:
Bleu Marine is just 150 metres from Mediterranean beaches and 300 metres from the centre of Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer village. It features a fenced, outdoor swimming pool with sun loungers and free Wi-Fi.

Several rooms at Hotel Le Bleu Marine have a balcony with pool view. Each room is equipped with a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom.

The buffet breakfast is served every morning. Many shops and restaurants are less than 10 minutes’ walk from the hotel. Hot and cold drinks are available upon request.

There is a thalassotherapy centre just 100 metres from the hotel's door.

Hotel Le Bleu Marine is 40 km from Arles and 60 km from Montpellier. Free parking is available on site.
address: 15, Avenue du Docteur Cambon, 13460 Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, France

hotel_name: Oh! Campings - Le Clos du Rhône
description: Oh! Campings - Le Clos du Rhône in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer offers direct beachfront access with Clos Du Rhone Beach just a 2-minute walk away. Guests can enjoy the outdoor swimming pool and relax on the sun terrace.

Situated 100 metres from sandy beaches and 200 metres from Eglise des Stes Maries in Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer, Hotel Les Palmiers En Camargue features free WiFi access.

A flat-screen TV with satellite channels is provided. A terrace or balcony are featured in certain rooms.

A buffet breakfast with both sweet and savoury options is served at the property.

You can engage in various activities, such as horse riding, windsurfing and cycling.

Montpellier - Mediterranee Airport is 53 km from the property. Public parking is available 50 metres away at no extra cost while private garage parking is available upon request for an extra charge.

Hotel de l'île in Avignon offers family rooms with private bathrooms, garden views, and modern amenities including free WiFi, TV, and soundproofing. Each room features a wardrobe, bath, bidet, and shower.
address: 12 chemin de la Barthelasse, 84000 Avignon, France

description:
Hôtel Les Corps Saints boasts a location facing Agricol Perdiguier Square in Avignon's historic city centre, 5 minutes' walk from the train station. The rooms include free WiFi. Corps Saints Square is 80 metres from the hotel.

Only accessible by stairs, the rooms come with a TV and have a private bathroom with a shower.

For an additional fee, guests can enjoy a buffet breakfast with cheese, pastries, cold meat, jams, yogurt, boiled and hard boiled eggs. Another breakfast option called 'Bistrot' is available and includes fruit juices, unlimited hot drinks, croissants, fresh bread, jams and homemade butter. Restaurants can be found less than 100 metres away.

Papal Palace is a 10 minutes' walk away. Public parking is available nearby for an additional charge. Avignon TGV train station is 15 km away.

Mas de Capelou is a 17th century Provencal house, 7 km from the centre of Avignon, offering B&B accommodation. Guests have access to the outdoor heated swimming pool, terrace with deck chairs and gardens.

Each guest room has its own unique decor and a private bathroom with shower, hairdryer and toiletries. All rooms feature air-conditioning.

The situation of the property is ideal for discovering the historic city of Avignon. The famous Palais des Papes is 7 km from the B&B.

Located next to Avignon Train Station, Novotel Avignon Centre offers an outdoor pool and a beauty salon. It also features a fitness centre and a spa with a sauna, a hot tub and hammam. Free WiFi is available throughout.

Decorated in a contemporary style, the air-conditioned rooms at Novotel Avignon offer a flat-screen TV and a minibar. The private bathroom has a bath or a shower.

Breakfast is served every morning in guest rooms or in the hotel’s breakfast room leading onto the patio. Guests can eat or enjoy a drink from the bar on the terrace, weather permitting.

Massages are available on site for an additional charge and the hotel has a children's playground.

The 24-hour reception and tour desk can provide advice on visiting Avignon’s town centre, a 10-minute walk away. Pont d'Avignon is 17 minutes' walk away. Paid public parking is possible on site.
  
Our Novospa spa and fitness center are now open. Come and discover their renovation.

In the heart of Avignon, Ibis Avignon Centre Gare is just 50 metres from the Avignon Train Station. It offers a 24-hour front desk, a bar, free WiFi and newspapers. Parking is available at the paid public parking area of the train station, located at the foot of the hotel.

The air-conditioned hotels rooms have a flat-screen TV with cable channels and a wardrobe. They all offer an en suite bathroom with a shower. Ironing facilities are also available.

A buffet breakfast composed of sweet and savoury dishes such as eggs, fruit salad, yogurts and juices is served every day. Pastries baked on site and fresh French Madeleine cakes are also on offer, as well as a hot beverage and a piece of fruit to take away. Outside of regular breakfast hours guests can also enjoy a lighter option, available from 04:00.

There is an à-la-carte restaurant on site and guests can also relax with a drink at the hotel’s bar.

Famous touristic sights like the Palais des Papes or the Pont d’Avignon Saint-Bénezet are within 1 km. Guests can drive 30 km to The Pont du Gard. Avignon TGV Train Station is 3 km away.

Set in central Avignon, a 15-minute walk from Palais des Papes and Pont d'Avignon, this 16th-century hotel offers an outdoor rooftop pool with a large sun terrace. Some of the stylish rooms are located in the historic building featuring archways and vaulted ceilings. Free WiFi is available.

Each air-conditioned room includes a flat-screen TV with satellite channels. All rooms are non-smoking and have a contemporary bathroom with a hairdryer. Some rooms feature a balcony with views of the courtyard.

Restaurant Le Saint Louis serves traditional French cuisine at Hôtel Cloitre Saint Louis. Guests can dine on the terrace in summer and enjoy drinks in the lounge bar. A buffet breakfast is prepared every morning. An in-room breakfast can be enjoyed at extra cost.

Calvet Museum and Avignon Train Station are a 5-minute walk from the hotel and Avignon Airport is a 20-minute drive away. Private parking is available.
address: 20, rue du Portail Boquier, 84000 Avignon, France

hotel_name: The Originals City, Hôtel Cap Sud, Avignon
description: The Originals City, Hôtel Cap Sud in Avignon offers comfortable rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and free WiFi. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and soundproofing for a pleasant stay.

Aparthotel Adagio Access Avignon is located by the Avignon TGV Train Station, only 10 minutes' drive from the town centre. The residence offers air-conditioned apartments and studios with a well-equipped kitchenette.

The studios and apartments have a simple décor. They include satellite TV, free internet access and a private bathroom.

Enjoy breakfast at the Aparthotel Adagio Access Avignon’s charming breakfast room. All rooms are serviced by a lift.

The residence is less than a 10-minute drive from the Palais des Papes and the Pont d’Avignon. Paid parking is available on site (reservation is not possible).
address: 6 Avenue de la Gare, 84000 Avignon, France

description:
Located in a verdant setting within the ancient city walls, Le Magnan offers free WiFi. It is a 10-minute walk from the Papal Palace.

Most of the comfortable guestrooms have a view of the garden and all rooms have an ensuite bathroom with bath or shower, direct-dial telephone, satellite TV and free WiFi internet access.

Le Magnan serves breakfast and in the summer months it can be enjoyed on the garden patio. A light breakfast including a hot drink, a French pastry and fruit juice can also be enjoyed at a reduced rate.

Just 5 minutes from the hotel, guests will find restaurants that feature traditional and regional French cuisine. They are able to accommodate groups and large parties.

The property is 700 metres from Avignon Centre Train Station, and 1 km from Avignon University.
address: 63 Rue du Portail Magnanen, 84000 Avignon, France

description:
Avignon Grand Hotel is ideally located just outside the city’s Middle Age walls, just 70 metres from Avignon Central Station. It is a 15-minute walk from Palais des Papes and offers a small rooftop pool. Free WiFi is available throughout.

The non-smoking rooms and suites come with a seating area, a safe, a flat-screen TV and tea and coffee making facilities. The bathroom facilities include a bath, a shower and free toiletries. Some suites feature a balcony or a terrace and offer views of the property building, the Mediterranean garden or the fortified city of Avignon.

Breakfast is available on a morning, which can be enjoyed on the private garden patio, weather permitting, or in the breakfast room which features large windows. It can also be served in the guest room for an additional charge. In the evening, In the evening, guests can dine in Le Saint Louis restaurant, which is 300 metres away.

Additional facilities at Avignon Grand Hotel include a 24-hour front desk and a bar.

Pont d'Avignon is 1.4 km away. A public underground car park is available for an additional charge and can be accessed directly from the hotel.

hotel_name: hotelF1 Avignon Centre Courtine gare TGV
description:
hotelf1 Avignon Centre Courtine Gare Tgv is located in Avignon, 2.9 km from Papal Palace and 3 km from Pont d'Avignon.

Each room includes a flat-screen TV. The rooms come with a shared bathroom.Guests can purchase microfibre towels at the hotel at an extra cost of EUR 3 each.

Courtine Parc d'Activités Business Park Avignon is 800 metres from Hotelf1 Avignon Centre Courtine, while Avignon ESAA Superior Art School is 1.5 km away. The nearest airport is Avignon-Provence Airport, 9 km from hotelf1 Avignon Centre Courtine Gare Tgv.
address: 205 rue J.M Tjibaou ZAC de Courtines, 84000 Avignon, France

description:
Located on Place de l'Horloge, the Kyriad Palais des Papes hotel is the ideal starting point for exploring the city. You will be opposite the Opera and only 75 meters from the majestic Palais des Papes and the Congress Center. Let yourself be charmed by a stroll to the famous Pont d'Avignon, just 500 meters away.

Relax in our air-conditioned rooms, equipped with a courtesy tray, a refrigerator and a flat-screen TV. Each private bathroom includes a hairdryer, with a bathtub or shower at your disposal for a moment of relaxation after a day of sightseeing.

Start Start your day off right with our delicious buffet breakfast, featuring pastries, cold meats, fresh fruit and a selection of hot and cold drinks.

The reception is open 24 hours a day to meet all your needs and ensure you have a worry-free stay.

Please note that the historic center of Avignon is a pedestrian zone. Car access to Place de l'Horloge is restricted. Although we do not have private parking, we offer discounts at several nearby public parking lots.

For further details on access and parking options, please do not hesitate to contact us directly.

The 3-star ibis Avignon Sud is ideally located 3 km from the city centre, a few minutes from the Pont d’Avignon and Avignon Convention Centre. It features an outdoor swimming pool with a sun terrace and a garden.

The 93 air-conditioned rooms include free WiFi access and satellite TV and Canal + Channel. The modern rooms all have a private bathroom fitted with a bathtub or shower.

A buffet breakfast composed of sweet and savoury dishes such as eggs, fruit salad, yogurts and juices is served every day. Pastries baked on site and fresh French Madeleine cakes are also on offer, as well as a hot beverage and a piece of fruit to take away. Outside of regular breakfast hours guests can also enjoy a lighter option, available from 04:00.

Meals and snacks are available from the hotel’s restaurant, and the bar with its terrace is open 24/7.

The hotel is situated in the heart of Provence and the Châteauneuf du Pape vineyards. Avignon Centre Train Station is 5 km away. Free private parking is possible on site.
address: 71 Chemin de la Cristole, 84918 Avignon, France

hotel_name: Best Western Plus Le Lavarin Avignon
description:
The Best Western Hôtel du Lavarin is located in Avignon, 2.5 km from the ramparts, the Palais des Papes and the Pont d'Avignon. A fitness room and an indoor swimming pool are also available on site, exclusively for adults.

The hotel offers comfortable, air-conditioned rooms with free Wi-Fi access.

Breakfast and other meals are served with a taste of Provence, in the restaurant, patio or garden. The restaurant is open from Monday to Friday for lunch and dinner and on Saturday evenings. Please note that catering is not available outside the restaurant's opening days and hours.

The hotel's garden features olive and plane trees and a private outdoor swimming pool. Free, secure, enclosed parking is available on site, with 4 electric charging points.

The hotel is a 5-minute bus ride from the TGV train station (bus no. 30) and a 15-minute bus ride from Avignon city centre. The bus stop is 50 metres from the hotel. The Gardon gorges, the Pont du Gard and Mont Ventoux are a 30-minute drive away.

Enjoy a comfortable stay at Apart’Hotel Sainte-Marthe and feel right at home. We offer double, triple, quadruple, and six-person rooms with air conditioning, equipped kitchenettes, bathrooms, TVs, and high-speed Wi-Fi.  The icing on the cake: some rooms have private balconies and facilities adapted for people with reduced mobility.
The residence is open all year round and is ideally located close to transport links and a stone's throw from the historic center of Avignon.
The continental buffet breakfast is popular with our guests and is served from 7:30 a.m. to 10:00 a.m. every morning.
Our advantages:
•    Location 
•    Private and secure parking (additional charge – electric charging stations available) or public parking a 5-minute walk away
•    Continental breakfast buffet (additional charge)
•    Terrace with unique views of the Palais des Papes, the ramparts, and the university
•    Private balcony for some rooms
•    Fully equipped kitchenette (dishes, hotplates, refrigerator, microwave)
•    High-speed Wi-Fi 
•    TV
•    Bathrooms
•    Air-conditioned gym (free)
•    Rooms accessible to people with reduced mobility
•    Laundromat on the ground floor
•    Supermarket at the foot of the residence
•    Restaurants nearby
•    Secure bike storage on the ground floor
•    Bus stops and free Orizo shuttle in front of the residence
Auberge de jeunesse HI Avignon in Avignon offers air-conditioned rooms with private or shared bathrooms. Each room includes a shower, wardrobe, and free WiFi.

description:
